programmes.show_description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
1/21. Isabelle, Phoenix and Oona are on their way to meet Mossy. Tha Iseabail, Phoenix is Onna dol a choinneachadh Mosaidh.
2/21. Bernie has been washed out to sea on a bit of driftwood. Tha Bernie air a sguabadh a-mach gu muir air pìos fiodha, fhad 's a dh'fhan e ri Bernadette 'son clic.
5/40. Tha Boban is Fuigheag a' dol air misean an-diugh is feumar deagh bhalaist! Boban and Fuigheag are going on a mission today and good balance is needed!
15/15. Tha Eilidh NicCarmaig a' coinneachadh ri Angus agus na ceithir cait aige. Eilidh Cormack meets Angus and his four cats.
35/52. Tha AH-AH is MacÌomhair a' tòiseachadh cruinneachaidhean ach chan eil cùisean sìtheil. AH-AH and MacÌomhair start collections, but things aren't peaceful.
13/52. Tha Posy toilichte gur e Là an Aodaich-oidhch' a th'ann ach tha Pip 'son cluich sa phàirc. Posy is delighted that it's Pyjama Day but Pip wants to go and play in the park.
14/52. Tha Pip is Posy a' dèanamh adan gòrach ach tha Posy a' briseadh gealladh lùdaig. Pip and Posy make silly hats, but Posy breaks a pinky promise.
4/9. Catriona Mhoireach a' leughadh Tad. A bedtime story for young children. Catriona Murray reads Tad.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 41/52. Tha'n Trùmpaid Rìoghail air a dhol air chall - càite am b'urrainn dhi a bhith? The royal trumpet has gone missing, where can it be?
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 42/52. Abair gu bheil Bleideag iarratach 's Stella na manaidsear-sgìreil oirr'. Bleideag is very demanding when Stella becomes her community manager.
...Gumbalan/Bottersnikes and Gumbles. 42/52. Tha Troig trang a' dèanamh fàidhireachdan an-diugh 's e air misean teasairginn. Troig is busy foretelling futures when he is on a rescue mission.
11/13. Chan eil sgeul air neach air bòrd an Orca Dhorch - càite bheil iad? The Dark Orca is completely deserted. Where is everyone?
5/5. Iagan MacNeil explores the Fife Coastal Path, from Crail to Newburgh. Tha Iagan MacNèill a'coiseachd cladach Fìobha, bho Charaile gu Newburgh.
11/13. Joy Dunlop meets learner and musician Teya-Jean Bawden who lives near Beauly, and Calum Maclean goes in search of some tasty match-day treats in Kilmarnock.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
3/6. The time has come, and Peter is ready to buy some Highland cows. Là na Fèille ann agus tha Pàdruig deiseil airson crodh Gàidhealach a cheannach.
3/10. Daoine bho air feadh Alba a tha a' gabhail chun an rathad mhòir anns na bhanaichean-campachaidh aca fhèin. Meeting Scots who have taken to the open road in campervans.
6/6. Julie Fowlis agus Muireann Nic Amhlaoibh le taghadh ciùil bho Transatlantic Sessions. Julie Fowlis and Muireann Nic Amhlaoibh present highlights from Transatlantic Sessions.
Dr Euan MacDonald moves to Rotorua in New Zealand to work in the city's hospital. An Dr. Euan Dòmhnallach a' dol gu Sealann Nuadh, a dh' obair san ospadal ann an Rotorua.

programmes.show_name: Seòid a' Chidsin - The Kitchen Coves
programmes.show_description: 1/6. Tha na seòid a' feuchainn air stoidhe còcaireachd Hangi. The lads try their hand at cooking Hangi style.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
35/52. Tha AH-AH is MacÌomhair a' tòiseachadh cruinneachaidhean ach chan eil cùisean sìtheil. AH-AH and MacÌomhair start collections, but things aren't peaceful.
13/52. Tha Posy toilichte gur e Là an Aodaich-oidhch' a th'ann ach tha Pip 'son cluich sa phàirc. Posy is delighted that it's Pyjama Day but Pip wants to go and play in the park.
14/52. Tha Pip is Posy a' dèanamh adan gòrach ach tha Posy a' briseadh gealladh lùdaig. Pip and Posy make silly hats, but Posy breaks a pinky promise.
...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 32/52. Abney and Teal construct a dragon. Neep puts on a brave face, but he isn't really sure he wants to share the island with such a scary monster!
16/26. Tha Daolag Bhreac is Seillean tuathal leis na rinn iad de thoinneamh. Daolag Bhreac and Seillean are dizzy after the amount of spinning they've done.
3/26. Ernest is tired of being spied on by his neighbour. To cure her of the habit, he decides to play a joke on her, starring Célestine and Boléro.
5/9. Ruairidh Graham reads Bùth nan Gàirean, written and illustrated by Satoshi Kitamura and translated into Gaelic by Morag Stewart.
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 49/52. The people of Grimsby believe the Twins are wise lifestyle gurus, able to predict what everyone wants before they know it themselves.
10/13. Tha stoirm a' tighinn - tha a h-uile seòrs' aimsir ann. An e Spioradan na Sìd' as coireach? There's a storm coming with all sorts of weather. Are the Weather Spirits to blame?
1/6. Hannah McKirdy takes a look at some of the crazy challenges attempted by the CBBC Alba team, including some very competitive cabbage rolling!
6/6. Latha mòr a' chonsairt aig Sgoil Taobh na Cloiche ach tha trioblaidean air fàire. It's the day of the big concert at Sgoil Taobh na Cloiche, but there is trouble brewing.
4/6. Gary Dingwall shows us how to play the challenging 14th at Royal Dornoch called 'Foxy', and professional coach Keil Beveridge demonstrates his weekly top playing tip.
11/13. Learner Ilse Alim, who was raised in Germany, chats to Joy in the studio and Calum Maclean is in Scotland's Book Town.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
6/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.
3/3. Anne Lundon explores rain's value to communities around the world. Tha Anne Lundon a' rannsachadh luach an uisge ann an coimhearsnachdan air feadh an t-saoghail.
3/10. Daoine bho air feadh Alba a tha a' gabhail chun an rathad mhòir anns na bhanaichean-campachaidh aca fhèin. Meeting Scots who have taken to the open road in campervans.
4/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.
2/20. Love, loss and added extras are in the air for Miss Harper, the teacher.
1/9. Prògram spioradail le laoidhean, sailm agus leughaidhean. Iain MacKinnon presents with a mix of hymns, psalms and readings from Coats in Paisley.
